title: Mouse Extermination in Hicksville, Long Island | $350-$600 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional mouse extermination services in Hicksville, Long Island. Effective rodent removal for homes and businesses. Licensed exterminators. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Dealing with a mouse infestation in your Hicksville home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, effective mouse extermination services throughout Long Island, with proven solutions tailored to Hicksville's unique residential and commercial properties. Our licensed technicians use safe, industry-leading methods to eliminate mice and prevent future infestations.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Hicksville and the broader Long Island community, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with advanced extermination techniques. We offer transparent pricing ($350-$600), same-day service availability, and a satisfaction guarantee that keeps Hicksville properties mouse-free year-round.
localContext: Hicksville's mix of mid-century ranch homes, the bustling Broadway Mall area, and commercial properties near the LIRR station creates diverse environments where mice seek shelter, especially during Long Island's colder months. Our technicians understand the specific challenges facing Hicksville residents, from older home foundations to food service establishments along South Broadway.

faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination services in Hicksville typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the extent of treatment required. We provide free inspections and upfront quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a mouse problem in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Hicksville residents. Most mouse extermination appointments can be scheduled within 24 hours of your call, and our technicians arrive fully equipped to begin treatment immediately.

faqs.question: What methods do you use for mouse extermination?
faqs.answer: We employ a comprehensive approach including inspection to identify entry points, strategic placement of traps and bait stations, exclusion work to seal access points, and sanitation recommendations. All methods are safe for families and pets while being highly effective against mouse populations.

faqs.question: Do you offer follow-up services after the initial treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide follow-up inspections and treatments as needed to ensure complete elimination of mice from your Hicksville property. Our service includes monitoring and preventative measures, and we offer ongoing maintenance plans to keep your home or business rodent-free long-term.
